# Deploy Smart Energy Grid Ai
## Step 1: Prerequisites
- Azure CLI, required Azure service access
## Step 2: Execute
az deployment group create -g rg-frootai-smart-energy-grid-ai -f infra/main.bicep
## Step 3: Verify
